message:
fix(generated): use ACFS_CHECKSUMS_YAML for verified installer checksums

The generated installer scripts were failing to find checksums.yaml when
run from the install.sh bootstrap process because:

1. install.sh sets ACFS_CHECKSUMS_YAML pointing to the bootstrap temp dir
2. Generated scripts used security.sh which has its own CHECKSUMS_FILE
3. The two variables were not connected

This fix adds CHECKSUMS_FILE=${ACFS_CHECKSUMS_YAML} before sourcing
security.sh, ensuring the verified installer checksum lookups work
correctly during bootstrap.

Also updates checksums.yaml to include:
- uv: was FETCH_FAILED, now has valid checksum
- slb: was missing, now has checksum

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# checksums.yaml - Auto-generated 2025-12-22T22:06:26+00:00
+# checksums.yaml - Auto-generated 2025-12-22T20:27:14-05:00
 # Run: ./scripts/lib/security.sh --update-checksums
 
 installers:
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@ installers:
 
   uv:
     url: "https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh"
-    sha256: "FETCH_FAILED"
+    sha256: "e27424708d1ac59cfc94e3f540a111f2edbb37bc8164febce8ee7fa5d5505c71"
 
   ntm:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/main/install.sh"
@@ -46,6 +46,10 @@ installers:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh"
     sha256: "0a2591c9a52ad003a4dcee8f3098af67b122b019a68eb3f03f37cd8021675198"
 
+  slb:
+    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/simultaneous_launch_button/main/scripts/install.sh"
+    sha256: "bc278b4b234e3f85c9dc4def16336f420d5823fabba48aec26c4f72685dba191"
+
   nvm:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.1/install.sh"
     sha256: "abdb525ee9f5b48b34d8ed9fc67c6013fb0f659712e401ecd88ab989b3af8f53"

@@ -79,6 +79,11 @@ acfs_security_init() {
         return 1
     fi
 
+    # Use ACFS_CHECKSUMS_YAML if set by install.sh bootstrap (overrides security.sh default)
+    if [[ -n "\${ACFS_CHECKSUMS_YAML:-}" ]]; then
+        export CHECKSUMS_FILE="\${ACFS_CHECKSUMS_YAML}"
+    fi
+
     # shellcheck source=../lib/security.sh
     # shellcheck disable=SC1091  # runtime relative source
     source "\$security_lib"
